notes: Concept 'the engraved celestial atlas, in daylight'. Sourced via a real web research pass: Flamsteed Atlas Coelestis (1729, equatorial grid), Bayer Uranometria (1603, engraving + magnitude designation), Bode Uranographia (1801, dense-field contrast), and the red-light night-vision convention it deliberately answers. Evolved from the v1 closed-book draft; Sources & lineage formalized, embodiment specimen added.
